summary: Search profiles by name, company, location, and other professional attributes.

query_params.name: currentCompany
query_params.description: Filter by company ID or URL; supports multiple comma-separated values

query_params.name: pastCompany
query_params.description: Filter by past company ID or URL; supports multiple comma-separated values

query_params.name: school
query_params.description: Filter by school ID or URL; supports multiple comma-separated values

query_params.name: geoId
query_params.description: Filter by location as Geo ID; overrides location parameter

query_params.name: industryId
query_params.description: Filter by industry ID; supports multiple comma-separated values

query_params.name: keywordsCompany
query_params.description: Filter by keywords in company name

query_params.name: keywordsSchool
query_params.description: Filter by keywords in school name

query_params.name: followerOf
query_params.description: Filter profiles that follow a given profile; supports multiple comma-separated values

notes: Location text search may return unexpected results; use geo search endpoint for precise IDs. Pagination via page and paginationToken.
